deploy.startCommand: python -c "import os; from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text; e=create_engine(os.environ['DATABASE_URL']); c=e.connect(); c.execute(text('ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_admin BOOLEAN DEFAULT false')); c.commit(); c.close(); print('is_admin column ensured')" ; flask db upgrade ; export RUN_SCHEDULER=1 ; gunicorn wsgi:app --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 1 --threads 4 --timeout 120
